message:
feat(analytics): add comprehensive GA4 acquisition tracking and diagnostics

- Add diagnose-ga4-settings.ts to check GA4 configuration (Google Signals,
  data retention, custom dimensions, geographic/demographic data)
- Add fix-ga4-settings.ts to enable Google Signals, extend data retention
  to 14 months, and create missing custom dimensions
- Enhance analytics.ts with acquisition tracking:
  - UTM parameter extraction from URL
  - Referrer tracking with domain inference (google, twitter, etc.)
  - First-touch attribution with localStorage persistence
  - Platform detection from user agent
  - Integration with session_start event

This addresses missing demographic and geographic data in GA4 reports.
Google Signals must be manually enabled in GA4 Admin UI.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
